svg.aria-label: Cloud infrastructure essence covering network compute and data planes with Shadow AI usage and over-privileged IAM exposing data to unmonitored agents, remediated by Zero Trust access redesign within 3 months and post-quantum crypto migration plus GuardDuty Extended Threat Detection rollout cutting breach detect time from 45 days to 24 hours and 70% sec cost reduction.
svg.title: 2025-11-26: Cloud infra essence to future, Shadow AI, post-quantum

g.text: Shadow AI tools used : IP leak : IAM 0/0 admin :...

Engineers use ChatGPT prod data : IAM star policy : SG...
